description: Style Noteonly gas can get the rugged desert boot aesthetic just right. This mid-top pair with its lush colouring is a closet essential that tops out wish-list for the season! Simply styled, these shoes pack a high-octane fashion kick. Wear this with your denims/chinos rolled up for maximum effect.Product DetailsTapering blunt toed suede upper with mid-top stylingA loop at the sides of the vamp for central lace-upsReinforced overlay at the heelUpper stitched to the TPR outsole (which has a stacked heel)Material and CareSuedeDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
